title: Atomic Design todo UI, pages, accessibility, and Server Action wiring
description: Implement MVP UI per architecture brief: CSS Modules co-located with Atomic Design components (atoms/molecules/organisms), shared tokens, main todo route(s) composing organisms. Wire forms and interactions to Server Actions from task 05 only (no direct DB). Cover full CRUD UX: create, list, toggle complete, inline or modal edit, delete with confirmation per MVP, empty state, and visible error/retry for load/save failures. Meet accessibility: semantic structure, labels, keyboard operation, sensible focus for edit/delete flows.
acceptance: All data mutations and loads go through Server Actions or documented server reads that respect the brief (no sqlite or repository imports in components).
UI implements create, list, toggle, edit text, delete with confirmation, and empty state messaging.
User-visible error and retry (or recovery) paths exist for load/save failures consistent with backend error contract.
Components are organized under src/components/ui per Atomic Design; styles use CSS Modules plus shared tokens from src/styles.
Accessibility: inputs labeled, list semantics, keyboard-accessible toggle/edit/delete, focus management acceptable for edit/cancel flows.
No Stitch or design_package dependency; visual design is minimal reference quality per brief.
